title: Error with MSB bit in EDIF writer
code_blocks:
read_verilog testmodule.v
write_edif -nogndvcc dump.edf
write_verilog -noattr dump.v

(cell testmodule
      (cellType GENERIC)
      (view VIEW_NETLIST
        (viewType NETLIST)
        (interface
          (port (array Q 2) (direction OUTPUT))
          (port (array A 2) (direction INPUT))
        )
        (contents
          (instance inst1
            (viewRef VIEW_NETLIST (cellRef BUF (libraryRef LIB))))
          (instance inst0
            (viewRef VIEW_NETLIST (cellRef INV (libraryRef LIB))))
          (net (rename id00001 "A[0]") (joined
            (portRef (member A 1))
            (portRef A (instanceRef inst0))
          ))
          (net (rename id00002 "A[1]") (joined
            (portRef (member A 0))
            (portRef A (instanceRef inst1))
          ))
          (net (rename id00003 "Q[1]") (joined
            (portRef (member Q 0))
            (portRef Q (instanceRef inst1))
          ))
          (net (rename id00004 "Q[0]") (joined
            (portRef (member Q 1))
            (portRef Q (instanceRef inst0))
          ))
        )
      )
    )

(cell testmodule
      (cellType GENERIC)
      (view VIEW_NETLIST
        (viewType NETLIST)
        (interface
          (port (array Q 2) (direction OUTPUT))
          (port (array A 2) (direction INPUT))
        )
        (contents
          (instance inst1
            (viewRef VIEW_NETLIST (cellRef BUF (libraryRef LIB))))
          (instance inst0
            (viewRef VIEW_NETLIST (cellRef INV (libraryRef LIB))))
          (net (rename id00001 "A[0]") (joined
            (portRef (member A 1))
            (portRef A (instanceRef inst1))
          ))
          (net (rename id00002 "A[1]") (joined
            (portRef (member A 0))
            (portRef A (instanceRef inst0))
          ))
          (net (rename id00003 "Q[1]") (joined
            (portRef (member Q 0))
            (portRef Q (instanceRef inst0))
          ))
          (net (rename id00004 "Q[0]") (joined
            (portRef (member Q 1))
            (portRef Q (instanceRef inst1))
          ))
        )
      )
    )
